name: Self-RAG
description: Retrieve, generate, then run two independent graders — relevance (did we retrieve the right docs?) and groundedness (does the answer cite them?) — looping back to retry or regenerate until both pass.

data.label: Two graders in series
data.text: Self-RAG grades the retrieval AND the generation independently. Relevance Grader: are the retrieved docs actually useful? On fail, retry retrieval. Groundedness Grader: does the answer actually cite the docs? On fail, regenerate.

data.label: Relevance Grader
data.scoringPrompt: Are the retrieved documents relevant to the question? Reply 'pass' if they contain enough information; 'fail' otherwise.

data.label: Generator
data.systemPrompt: Answer the question using ONLY the retrieved context. Cite the source for each claim.

data.label: Groundedness Grader
data.scoringPrompt: Is every claim in the answer supported by the retrieved context? Reply 'pass' if grounded, 'fail' if it hallucinates.

data.label: Rewrite Query
data.systemPrompt: The retrieved documents were not relevant. Rewrite the question to retrieve better ones. Output ONLY the rewritten query.
